Package com.stardevllc.starmclib.color

Class ColorUtils

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starmclib.color.ColorUtils
public final class ColorUtils extends Object
A collection of color utilities to support adding custom color codes that can be used.
Developers must use ColorUtils.color() method in order for custom color codes to be respected within this API

  • Method Details

    • coloredMessage

      public static void coloredMessage(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String message)

    • color

      public static String color(String uncolored)
      Colors a string with all options set to true using the color(String, boolean, boolean, boolean) method
      Parameters:
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • color

      public static String color(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String uncolored)
      Colors the string with all options set to true using the color(CommandSender, String, boolean, boolean, boolean) method and added permission checks
      Parameters:
      sender - The sender for permission checks
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • color

      public static String color(String uncolored, boolean translateBukkit, boolean translateCustom, boolean translateHex)
      Colors a String based on settings
      Parameters:
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      translateBukkit - If Default Bukkit Color Codes are translated
      translateCustom - If custom color codes are translated
      translateHex - If direct hex codes are translated (Note: Hex codes MUST be 6 characters long), will also prevent hex being translated if current Bukkit Version does not support Hex Codes
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • translateBukkit

      public static String translateBukkit(String uncolored)
      Translates default bukkit colors without fine-grained permissions
      Parameters:
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • translateBukkit

      public static String translateBukkit(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String uncolored)
      Colors default bukkit text with fine-grain permissions
      Parameters:
      sender - The sender (Can be null)
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • translateCustom

      public static String translateCustom(String uncolored)
      Translates custom color codes
      Parameters:
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • translateCustom

      public static String translateCustom(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String uncolored)
      Translates custom color codes
      Parameters:
      sender - The sender
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • isHexSupported

      public static boolean isHexSupported()

    • translateHex

      public static String translateHex(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String uncolored)
      Translates HEX colors
      Parameters:
      sender - The sender
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • color

      public static String color(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender, String uncolored, boolean translateBukkit, boolean translateCustom, boolean translateHex)
      Colors a String based on settings and with permission checks if sender is not null
      Parameters:
      sender - The sender to check for permission. This can be null though and the permission check is skipped
      uncolored - The uncolored text
      translateBukkit - If Default Bukkit Color Codes are translated
      translateCustom - If custom color codes are translated
      translateHex - If direct hex codes are translated (Note: Hex codes MUST be 6 characters long)
      Returns:
      The colored text

    • getHexCode

      public static String getHexCode(net.md_5.bungee.api.ChatColor color)
      Parameters:
      color - The color
      Returns:
      The hex code

    • isRGBComponentInRange

      public static boolean isRGBComponentInRange(int component)
      Utility method to check to see if an RGB component is valid
      Parameters:
      component - The r g b value
      Returns:
      If it is between 0 and 255

    • isValidCode

      public static boolean isValidCode(String code)
      Utility method to check for if the code matches the pattern
      Parameters:
      code - The code (can be null)
      Returns:
      If the code is valid according to the pattern

    • isValidHex

      public static boolean isValidHex(String str)
      Utility method to check for valid HEX values
      Parameters:
      str - The string to check
      Returns:
      If the string matches the HEX pattern

      customColor - The color to add
